name: roxum-ide
description: A minimal and powerful IDE/Code editor for Android
readme_summary: Roxum IDE is a mobile-first code editor and mini IDE for Android, built with Flutter. It integrates editing, terminal workflows, Git/GitHub tooling, AI assistance, and runtime downloads into a single application.
key_features: Mobile-first code editor and mini IDE
primary_use_case: Providing a comprehensive and powerful code editing and development environment directly on Android devices.
cover_image_prompt: A miniature, highly detailed workshop on a smartphone screen, where a skilled artisan is meticulously crafting intricate code structures. Tools like a glowing terminal, a miniature Git commit icon, and a small AI assistant robot are actively being used. The artisan is shown taking raw lines of code (represented as wooden planks) and transforming them into a polished, functional application (a miniature, glowing cityscape). The background is a clean, abstract digital space with subtle circuit board patterns. The overall mood is one of focused creation and powerful mobile development. 3D isometric illustration style with vibrant, clean colors and soft lighting.

name: note-gen
description: A cross-platform Markdown AI note-taking software.
readme_summary: NoteGen is a cross-platform, AI-native Markdown note-taking application designed for capturing ideas and transforming them into structured, readable notes. It offers a rich feature set including AI-powered writing assistance, image processing, local Markdown storage, and flexible synchronization options.
key_features: AI-native writing workflow (chat, rewrite, translate, polish)
Image workflow (capture, recognize, describe, host, reuse)
Built-in knowledge base (RAG, vector indexing, hybrid retrieval)
Extensible AI stack (MCP, custom models, agents)
Flexible sync (GitHub, Gitee, GitLab, Gitea, S3, WebDAV)
Cross-platform availability (Windows, macOS, Linux, Android, iOS)
primary_use_case: To provide a seamless and intelligent note-taking experience that leverages AI to help users capture, organize, and refine their thoughts and knowledge.
cover_image_prompt: A wise old librarian meticulously organizing scattered, glowing fragments of thoughts and images into a beautifully bound, illuminated manuscript. The librarian uses a magical quill that sparks with AI energy, transforming chaotic scribbles into coherent text and organized visual elements. In the background, shelves are filled with books representing local Markdown files and cloud sync icons. Subtle UI elements of a chat interface and image recognition appear as glowing overlays. The scene is set in a cozy, futuristic library with warm, inviting light. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with a focus on clarity and a touch of magic.

name: fingerprint-suite
description: Browser fingerprinting tools for anonymizing your scrapers. Developed by Apify.
readme_summary: The fingerprint-suite is a collection of TypeScript tools designed to generate and inject realistic browser fingerprints. It helps anonymize web scraping activities by making automated browsers appear as unique human users, thus bypassing detection.
key_features: Generates realistic browser fingerprints affecting JS APIs
Injects browser fingerprints into Playwright/Puppeteer instances
Includes a generative Bayesian network for fingerprint creation
Modular npm packages for separate or combined use
primary_use_case: Anonymizing web scrapers by injecting realistic browser fingerprints to avoid detection.
cover_image_prompt: A master illusionist, dressed in a modern suit with subtle digital circuit patterns, stands on a stage. In one hand, they hold a generic, plain browser icon. With their other hand, they cast a spell, transforming the plain icon into a unique, intricately detailed avatar with a distinct digital aura and a personalized data stream flowing from it. Around the stage, faint holographic projections display lines of code and abstract data visualizations, hinting at the underlying technology. The 'fingerprint-suite' logo is subtly integrated into the stage design. The scene is lit with dramatic spotlights, emphasizing the transformation. Style: 3D isometric illustration with a clean, modern aesthetic and a vibrant, tech-inspired color palette.

name: tabler-icons
description: A set of over 6000 free MIT-licensed high-quality SVG icons for you to use in your web projects.
readme_summary: Tabler Icons provides a comprehensive collection of over 6000 free, high-quality SVG icons designed for web projects. Each icon is crafted on a 24x24 grid with a 2px stroke, available in both outline and filled versions, and licensed under MIT.
key_features: Designed on a 24x24 grid with a 2px stroke
Available in outline and filled versions
Easy integration via ``, `background-image`, or inline SVG
CSS customizable for size, color, and stroke-width
primary_use_case: To provide web developers with a vast library of versatile and customizable SVG icons for use in their projects.
cover_image_prompt: A whimsical, overflowing treasure chest made of digital code, spilling out a cascade of perfectly formed, glowing SVG icons of various shapes and sizes. Each icon is distinct yet harmonious, representing a vast library. In the background, a stylized, minimalist web page template is being built, with the icons seamlessly slotting into place like puzzle pieces. Subtle lines of code and data streams flow around the scene, connecting the chest to the web page. The overall mood is one of abundance, creativity, and ease of use. The art style should be a vibrant 3D isometric illustration with a clean, modern aesthetic and bright, inviting colors.

name: swaptop
description: swap usage monitor written in rust
readme_summary: Swaptop is a real-time swap usage monitor for Linux and Windows systems, featuring a TUI interface that displays swap consumption per process and per software. It provides live-updating graphs, multiple color themes, and unit conversion, all with a lightweight memory footprint.
key_features: List Swap devices with usage per disk / type
primary_use_case: Monitoring and visualizing swap memory usage on Linux and Windows systems through a text-based user interface.
cover_image_prompt: A wise old tree with roots deeply embedded in the ground, its branches reaching upwards. Instead of leaves, the branches are adorned with glowing, interconnected nodes representing active processes. The tree's trunk is a clear, transparent pipe showing a steady flow of digital 'sap' (representing swap data) being drawn from the earth. Small, subtle UI elements like a graph and unit labels (KB, MB, GB) are integrated into the tree's base. The scene is set in a serene, digital forest with soft, ambient lighting, emphasizing clarity and insight. The overall style is a 3D isometric illustration with a clean, modern aesthetic, highlighting the flow and management of system resources.
